title: GD BetterLoot
description: Improves vanilla loot generated in structures.
body:
# GD BetterLoot
**Improves vanilla loot generated in structures.**

[![IMG Badge - Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/-WIKI-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook&logoColor=white)](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/projects/mods/gd-betterloot)
[![IMG Badge - Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SOURCE-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/GabrielDja/GD-BetterLoot)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-CURSEFORGE-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=e58e0e&logoColor=e58e0e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gd-betterloot)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-MODRINTH-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=17b95a&logoColor=17b95a)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gd-betterloot)
[![IMG Badge - Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SUPPORT-6d30fd?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/gabrieldja)
[![IMG Badge - GD Team](https://img.shields.io/badge/MY_WEBSITE-245cf3?style=for-the-badge)](https://gabrieldjalayer.wixsite.com/gabrieldja-gaming-yt)

GD BetterLoot increases the number of loot items generated, so you'll find that most of the time the chests are almost full, and with a few additional improvements.

### 📜 License: MIT
This pack was created by **GabrielDja**.

![GD BetterLoot - Preview](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/31958c_7e8bfcb6e7be4ff6a86ff91ba95a2493~mv2.png)

## ⭐ Supported structures
- Ancient City
- Desert Pyramid
- End city
- Igloo
- Jungle Temple
- Mineshaft
- Ocean Ruins

[**See all supported structures**](https://github.com/GabrielDja/GD-BetterLoot#supported-structures)

## ✨ Partners
